creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 185604
Update cacti to 1.1.18

Update cacti to 1.1.18.
This is a bugfix release, no need for merge-quarterly.

Commiter: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext - cacti has internal gettext support so does not require gettext in Makefile.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.18/
